title: Video Strategy for Cultural Institutions: Moving Beyond the Recap Reel
excerpt: The recap reel is where most cultural institution video begins — and unfortunately, where it ends. Here's what a real video strategy looks like for cultural organizations with serious communication objectives.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Event video production at St. Augustine Amphitheatre

content.alt: Video production planning for cultural institutions
content.caption: Strategic video starts with the audience, not the organization

seo.title: Video Strategy for Cultural Institutions | Beyond the Recap Reel | First Sight Films
seo.description: Move beyond the recap reel with a real video strategy for cultural institutions. Brand films, impact stories, and content that serves specific audiences and objectives.

schema.headline: Video Strategy for Cultural Institutions: Moving Beyond the Recap Reel
